ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the provider */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the provider */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the provider */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Prefix of the provider (e.g., Dr., Mr., Mrs., Ms.) */,
  "suffix" TEXT /* Suffix of the provider (e.g., MD, DO, NP) */,
  "tin" TEXT /* Tax Identification Number of the provider */,
  "npi" TEXT /* National Provider Identifier of the provider */,
  "address1" TEXT /* Primary address line of the provider */,
  "address2" TEXT /* Secondary address line of the provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the provider is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the provider is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the provider's location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the provider */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the provider */,
  "license_expiration" TEXT /* Date of license expiration */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the provider */,
  "certification_expiration" TEXT /* Date of certification expiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "address1" TEXT /* Primary address line of the facility */,
  "address2" TEXT /* Secondary address line of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the facility's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_facility" (
  "provider_facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider-facility association */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the provider at the facility (e.g., attending physician, consulting physician) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the provider's association with the facility */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the provider's association with the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_facility_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_facility_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider involved in the contract */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility involved in the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., employment, service agreement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_specialty" (
  "provider_specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider-specialty association */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty */,
  "primary_specialty" INTEGER /* Whether the specialty is the provider's primary specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_specialty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_specialty_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_specialty_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address1" TEXT /* Primary address line of the patient */,
  "address2" TEXT /* Secondary address line of the patient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the patient is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the patient is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient's location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the appointment is scheduled */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider associated with the user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., provider, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who treated the patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the treatment occurred */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis for the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided to the patient */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the patient's condition */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Test results (e.g., lab results, images) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_records_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_information" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who provided the service */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the service was provided */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service provided */,
  "amount_charged" TEXT /* Amount charged for the service */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_information_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_information_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_information_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_information" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the insurance */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the insurance coverage */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the insurance coverage */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance coverage (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_information_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration for the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "allergen" TEXT /* Name of the allergen */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Description of the patient's reaction */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the patient's reaction (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immunizations" (
  "immunization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immunization record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("immunization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunizations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
